  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve older search results for a given search"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/search/{id}/older"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve older search results for a given search.

  as={"h2"}
